summary_en: ¥4.0B upper limit, 2,000,000 shares (4.13% of shares outstanding), market purchase via discretionary investment method (投資一任方式), May 15, 2026 to March 24, 2027. Stated purpose: improved capital efficiency, flexible capital policy, shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice regarding determination of matters relating to acquisition of treasury shares (treasury share acquisition pursuant to Articles of Incorporation under Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief:
On May 14, 2026, the board of directors of VITAL KSK HOLDINGS resolved to acquire up to 2,000,000 shares of its own common stock, representing 4.13% of issued shares (excluding treasury stock), within a maximum expenditure of ¥4.0 billion. The acquisition will be executed through market purchase using a discretionary investment mandate (投資一任方式) from May 15, 2026 through March 24, 2027.

The stated purposes are to improve capital efficiency, implement flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions, and return capital to shareholders. At March 31, 2026, the company held 3,425,915 treasury shares and had 51,902,976 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock).
